hero.headline: Sundae Bliss in Every Creamy Scoop
hero.subheadline: Discover Chennai's coolest ice cream escape right here in Pammal. Fresh, handcrafted sundaes that turn ordinary moments into sweet memories.

about.title: Scoops of Happiness Since Forever
about.story: Nestled in Shop no.164, Polar Bear Ice Cream Sundaes has been serving pure joy through our legendary frozen creations. Our passion starts with locally sourced ingredients and ends with smiles in every spoonful.

highlights.title: Homemade Goodness
highlights.description: Every sundae crafted with love and fresh ingredients

highlights.title: Crazy Flavor Combos
highlights.description: Unique recipes that surprise and delight

highlights.title: Neighborhood Favorite
highlights.description: Pammal's go-to dessert destination for 15+ years

items.title: Classic Sundaes
items.description: Traditional favorites that never go out of style. Perfect for nostalgic sweet tooths.

items.title: Crazy Combo Sundaes
items.description: Wild flavor combinations that push the boundaries of deliciousness.

items.title: Custom Sundae Bar
items.description: Build your dream dessert with unlimited topping possibilities.

items.title: Birthday Celebration Packages
items.description: Make every birthday sweeter with our special sundae arrangements.

items.name: Rajesh Kumar
items.text: Best ice cream in Pammal! My kids can't get enough of their chocolate sundae.

items.name: Priya Shankar
items.text: Incredible flavors and such friendly service. A true gem in Krishna Nagar!

items.name: Arun Natarajan
items.text: Our weekend family treat. Consistently delicious and always fun.

items.question: Do you offer dairy-free options?
items.answer: Absolutely! We have multiple vegan and dairy-free sundaes to keep everyone smiling.

items.question: Can I pre-order for large groups?
items.answer: Yes! We love catering to parties and events. Call us 24 hours in advance.

items.question: What are your most popular flavors?
items.answer: Our Chocolate Avalanche and Mango Madness sundaes are crowd favorites!

items.question: Do you deliver?
items.answer: We offer delivery within Pammal and surrounding areas. Minimum order applies.

items.question: Are your ingredients locally sourced?
items.answer: We pride ourselves on using fresh, local ingredients from Tamil Nadu farmers.

contact.title: Let's Get Deliciously Connected
contact.subtitle: Your next sweet adventure is just a call away!

cta.title: Ready for a Flavor Explosion?
cta.subtitle: Life's too short for boring desserts

meta.title: Polar Bear Ice Cream Sundaes - Pammal's Coolest Dessert Destination
meta.description: Handcrafted sundaes, crazy flavors, and pure joy in every scoop. Discover Pammal's most loved ice cream experience!
